User.password_hash keeps #[serde(skip_serializing)] + #[schemars(skip)] verbatim across the crate move; byte-identical types.ts positively proves the field remains absent from the wire schema — no accidental exposure via the boundary. No visibility widening: ziee-auth exports only User/Group.

ziee-auth dep versions (serde 1.0.219 / schemars 0.9.0 / sqlx 0.8.6 / chrono 0.4 / uuid 1.18 / axum-login 0.18.0) match ziee's [workspace.dependencies] catalog so the single src-app/Cargo.lock unifies with no duplicate build; cargo check -p ziee, -p ziee-desktop, and `cd sdk && cargo check --workspace` all exit 0.
